demographics.living_situation: lives with family, including young children

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've got these red, itchy circles spreading all over my stomach and back, and they seem to be getting bigger by the hour. I'm really worried it's something contagious and that I'll pass it on to my kids — what is it and what can I do?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up fast over the last few days and it's really itchy, and I'm anxious about spreading it around the house, so I want to know what it is and how to stop it.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about three days ago as one small red patch, and since then more rings have come up
symptom_narrative.duration: three days, and the patches have been getting bigger and spreading outwards
symptom_narrative.character: itchy, ring-shaped red patches — the older ones look clearer in the middle with a raised, flaky edge around the outside
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really itchy and it's stressing me out, but I don't feel sick in myself
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across my tummy and back, and one on my left upper arm — they're not evenly spread, more on one side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant itch, worse through the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — the moisturiser I tried didn't help at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it's worse when I'm warm and sweaty or the room is humid
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the itch and the rash; no fever, I haven't lost weight, and my joints are fine
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the itch is distracting and I keep scratching, and I'm worried about the kids catching it

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: applied a few times over the last day or two

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with family including young children; got a new kitten about two weeks ago; worried about spreading the rash to the children

objective_data_offered.value: several red ring-shaped patches, roughly 2 to 5 cm across, on my tummy, back and left upper arm; the middles look clearer while the outer rims are raised and scaly; no blisters, no pus, and nothing on my mouth or private areas
36.8 C on my thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: around 76 beats per minute on my smartwatch
